data.content: Plan review feedback: the proposed Retake Now flow is incomplete for the requirement 'as if the user clicked Take! from the queued screen'. The plan only mentions startSession + upsertTerminal from RetakesView, but the current Take! behavior also reuses an existing running session for the beat via setActiveSession and blocks launch when a parent/ancestor is already rolling. Please revise the plan to cover how Retake Now will preserve those guardrails and session semantics instead of starting a duplicate or bypassing ancestor checks. Also extend the test strategy to cover these branches and the post-update/start-session failure path.
